title: drive_leg_result
description: One transport leg's driver dispatch outcome -- REPORTED, not self-graded. The judge room independently grades the captured evidence.

evidence_refs.description: Paths or retained ids for the captured evidence (frames/screenshots/traces).

frames_dir.description: Directory of captured frames/screenshots for this leg, if any.

blockers.description: Honest blockers if evidence could not be captured (e.g. a JSON-degraded visual surface).

summary.description: What the driver actually attempted for this leg.
